title: Mylinux
description: Minimal Arch Linux setup with BSPWM for a lightweight, tiling workflow. High customization and efficiency.

title: Mybash
description: Custom Bash scripts for automation, system monitoring, and environment setup. Well-documented for easy use.

title: Terminal Doom
description: Play classic DOOM in your terminal via Docker. Alpine-based container with pre-configured DOOM.

title: Mykubernetes
description: ConfigMaps, RBAC, monitoring, persistent volumes. Custom kubectl aliases for efficient workflow.

title: Medus-Storefront
description: CI/CD pipeline for Medusa e-commerce on Amazon ECS using GitHub Actions and Terraform.

title: Web Scraper
description: Puppeteer scraping with Python server. Extracts titles, links, meta. Containerized with Docker.

title: Strapi Deployment
description: Automated Strapi CMS deployment with Docker, Terraform, GitHub Actions on Amazon ECS.

title: Kubepulse
description: Lightweight self-hosted K8s monitoring dashboard. Agent pushes data over HTTPS, no inbound ports.
